templates.name: AngularJS Webpack Starter
templates.description: A simple and complete starter template for building AngularJS (1.x) applications using Webpack, with modern JavaScript support and a ready-to-use development workflow.

templates.name: Fullstack Node.js, React & MongoDB Starter
templates.description: A full-stack JavaScript starter project built with Node.js, React, and MongoDB, featuring modern tooling such as Babel, Docker, and Swagger for scalable and maintainable application development.

templates.name: Node.js Apollo GraphQL PostgreSQL Starter
templates.description: A Node.js starter template featuring a GraphQL API powered by Apollo Server, with PostgreSQL and Sequelize for relational data management, designed for scalable backend development.

templates.name: Node.js Express Babel Starter
templates.description: A minimal Node.js starter template using Express.js with Babel support, preconfigured with essential tools for building modern and maintainable backend applications.

templates.name: Node.js Express Mocha & Chai Starter
templates.description: A Node.js starter template with Express.js, Babel support, and a complete testing setup using Mocha and Chai for asynchronous testing and coverage reporting.

templates.name: Node.js MongoDB Docker Starter
templates.description: A production-ready Node.js starter template with MongoDB, Docker support, and a fully configured development workflow including testing, linting, CI, and security best practices.

templates.name: Node.js MongoDB GraphQL Starter
templates.description: A Node.js starter template featuring a GraphQL API with MongoDB integration, built with Express.js and equipped with modern tooling for scalable backend development.

templates.name: Node.js PostgreSQL Sequelize Mocha Starter
templates.description: A Node.js starter template with a RESTful API, PostgreSQL database integration using Sequelize, and a complete testing setup with Mocha and Chai, along with modern development tooling.

templates.name: React Redux Starter
templates.description: A React starter template built with Create React App, featuring Redux for state management and a preconfigured project structure to accelerate frontend development.

templates.name: React Webpack Starter
templates.description: A React starter template with a fully configured Webpack setup for both development and production, offering more flexibility than Create React App along with modern tooling and code quality integrations.

templates.name: React Webpack Jest Starter
templates.description: A React starter template with a fully configured Webpack setup and integrated testing using Jest and Enzyme, along with modern tooling for scalable frontend development.

templates.name: React Webpack Redux Jest Starter
templates.description: A React starter template with a custom Webpack setup, Redux for state management, and integrated testing using Jest and Enzyme, along with modern tooling for scalable frontend development.

templates.name: React Native TensorFlow.js Starter
templates.description: A React Native starter template using Expo and TensorFlow.js, featuring MobileNet integration for building mobile applications with on-device machine learning capabilities.

templates.name: React Native GraphQL AWS AppSync Starter
templates.description: A React Native starter template with GraphQL powered by AWS AppSync and DynamoDB, designed for building scalable cross-platform mobile applications with real-time capabilities.

templates.name: Vue Vuex Starter
templates.description: A Vue.js starter template with Vuex configured for state management, providing a simple and scalable foundation for building modern frontend applications.

templates.name: Node.js TDD Setup with Mocha & Chai (Tutorial 126)
templates.description: A Node.js TDD starter kit based on a YouTube crash course, demonstrating how to set up and use Mocha, Chai, and Supertest for testing. Includes a simple Express server with ES6 support via Babel.

templates.name: MERN TypeScript Multi-Platform Starter
templates.description: A full-stack MERN (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) starter template built with TypeScript, supporting web and mobile platforms with integrated authentication, testing, and modern development tooling.

templates.name: React TypeScript Gulp MySQL Starter
templates.description: A full-stack starter template combining React and Node.js with TypeScript, using Gulp for task automation, Pug for templating, and MySQL for relational data storage, with testing support included.

templates.name: Node.js TypeScript GraphQL Simple Starter
templates.description: A minimal Node.js starter template using TypeScript and ts-node, with a simple GraphQL setup for building lightweight APIs quickly.

templates.name: Node.js TypeScript MySQL Sequelize Auth Starter
templates.description: A Node.js starter template using TypeScript with MySQL and Sequelize, featuring a basic authentication system with signup and login, along with a structured backend architecture.

templates.name: Node.js TypeScript Simple Starter
templates.description: A minimal Node.js starter template using TypeScript and ts-node, providing a simple and lightweight setup for building backend applications quickly.

templates.name: Node.js TypeScript TypeORM SQLite Auth Starter
templates.description: A Node.js starter template using TypeScript with SQLite and TypeORM, featuring Express.js and Passport.js for building lightweight backend applications with authentication.

templates.name: Expo TypeScript ZEIT Starter
templates.description: A mobile starter template built with Expo and TypeScript, featuring API integration with Axios, testing with Jest, and deployment support using ZEIT (Vercel).

templates.name: React Native TypeScript GraphQL Apollo Starter
templates.description: A React Native starter template using TypeScript, Apollo Client, and GraphQL, with Expo support for building scalable cross-platform mobile applications and integrated testing setup.

templates.name: React Native TypeScript E2E Starter
templates.description: A React Native starter template using TypeScript, designed for building cross-platform mobile applications with a foundation ready for end-to-end (E2E) testing and modern development practices.

templates.name: React TypeScript Simple Starter
templates.description: A minimal React starter template using TypeScript, featuring a simple setup with testing support for building scalable frontend applications.

templates.name: React TypeScript Redux Starter
templates.description: A React starter template using TypeScript and Redux for state management, featuring a simple setup with sample store, actions, and reducers for scalable frontend development.

templates.name: React TypeScript Webpack Jest Starter
templates.description: A React starter template using TypeScript with a custom Webpack setup and integrated testing using Jest, along with linting for code quality and maintainability.

templates.name: React TypeScript Webpack Redux Jest Advanced Starter
templates.description: An advanced React starter template using TypeScript with a custom Webpack setup, Redux for state management, and Jest for testing. Optimized for performance with multiple TypeScript loader options and hot reloading support.
